content.text: Now let me read the current state of the `saveCondensedFeatures` describe block to make the remaining changes:

Now I need to make these changes in the `saveCondensedFeatures` block:

1. Remove `condensedFeaturesService.updateCondensedFeature.mockClear()` from `beforeEach`
2. Replace the first test `'should create condensed feature and log debug on success'` with the new `'should call upsertCondensedFeature with correct params'` test, removing `updateCondensedFeature` and `loggerWarnSpy` expects
3. Remove the 3 old tests and add 2 new ones

Let me do all the `saveCondensedFeatures` block changes at once:

content.content:
<tool_use_error>String to replace not found in file.
String: 		loggerDebugSpy.mockClear();
		loggerWarnSpy.mockClear();
		condensedFeaturesService.upsertCondensedFeature.mockClear();
		condensedFeaturesService.updateCondensedFeature.mockClear();
	});

	it('should create condensed feature and log debug on success', async () => {
		const styleId = 12345;
		const condensedFeatures = ['feature-a', 'feature-b'];

		await saveCondensedFeaturesMethod({ styleId, condensedFeatures });

		expect(condensedFeaturesService.upsertCondensedFeature).toHaveBeenCalledTimes(1);
		expect(condensedFeaturesService.upsertCondensedFeature).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
			data: { style_id: styleId, condensed_features: condensedFeatures },
		});
		expect(condensedFeaturesService.updateCondensedFeature).not.toHaveBeenCalled();
		expect(loggerDebugSpy).toHaveBeenCalledWith(
			`Condensed features saved for style ${styleId}: ${condensedFeatures.join(', ')}`,
		);
		expect(loggerWarnSpy).not.toHaveBeenCalled();
	});

	it('should fall back to update and log warn when createCondensedFeature throws duplicate entry error', async () => {
		const styleId = 2803000;
		const condensedFeatures = ['feature-x', 'feature-y'];
		const duplicateError = new Error(
			"Duplicate entry '2803000' for key 'condensed_features.condensed_features_style_id_unique'",
		);
		condensedFeaturesService.upsertCondensedFeature.mockRejectedValueOnce(
			duplicateError,
		);

		await saveCondensedFeaturesMethod({ styleId, condensedFeatures });

		expect(condensedFeaturesService.upsertCondensedFeature).toHaveBeenCalledTimes(1);
		expect(condensedFeaturesService.updateCondensedFeature).toHaveBeenCalledTimes(1);
		expect(condensedFeaturesService.updateCondensedFeature).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
			styleId,
			condensedFeatures,
		});
		expect(loggerWarnSpy).toHaveBeenCalledWith(
			`Duplicate entry on insert for style ${styleId}, falling back to update`,
		);
	});

	it('should rethrow non-duplicate errors without calling update', async () => {
		const styleId = 99999;
		const condensedFeatures = ['feature-1'];
		const dbError = new Error('Connection refused');
		condensedFeaturesService.upsertCondensedFeature.mockRejectedValueOnce(dbError);

		await expect(
			saveCondensedFeaturesMethod({ styleId, condensedFeatures }),
		).rejects.toThrow('Connection refused');

		expect(condensedFeaturesService.updateCondensedFeature).not.toHaveBeenCalled();
		expect(loggerWarnSpy).not.toHaveBeenCalled();
		expect(loggerDebugSpy).not.toHaveBeenCalled();
	});

	it('should rethrow non-Error exceptions without calling update', async () => {
		const styleId = 11111;
		const condensedFeatures = ['feature-z'];
		condensedFeaturesService.upsertCondensedFeature.mockRejectedValueOnce(
			'unexpected string error',
		);

		await expect(
			saveCondensedFeaturesMethod({ styleId, condensedFeatures }),
		).rejects.toBe('unexpected string error');

		expect(condensedFeaturesService.updateCondensedFeature).not.toHaveBeenCalled();
		expect(loggerWarnSpy).not.toHaveBeenCalled();
		expect(loggerDebugSpy).not.toHaveBeenCalled();
	});
});</tool_use_error>
